arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes PSG vs Arsenal prediction for Champions League semi-final second leg
arts.sum: Arsenal trail Paris Saint-Germain by one goal heading into the second leg of their Champions League semi-final tie at the Parc des Princes on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: PSG v Arsenal LIVE: Team news and Timber injury updates as Gunners sweat in bid for Champions League comeback
arts.sum: Inter Milan await the winner of the second Champions League semi-final as Arsenal bid to bounce back from last week’s 1-0 defeat

arts.ttl: “I have a good feeling” – Thomas Vermaelen on why he thinks Arsenal can do it against PSG
arts.sum: Former Arsenal defender Thomas Vermaelen has insisted they can beat Paris Saint-Germain, and admits he has a good feeling about his old side. DH Net have an interview with the Belgian defender today in which he insists he’s confident Mikel Arteta’s side can progress to the Champions League final. Arsenal take on PSG in Paris The post “I have a good feeling” – Thomas Vermaelen on why he thinks Arsenal can do it against PSG appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Eight players could miss PSG vs Arsenal showdown with late fitness test planned
arts.sum: Arsenal will be aiming to make the Champions League final on Thursday as they travel to France to take on Ligue 1 giants Paris Saint-Germain but they will have to do it without a few key stars

arts.ttl: PSG taunt Arsenal over tifo embarrassment as 'masterpiece' claim spices up Champions League decider
arts.sum: The Gunners were lambasted for their tifo attempt at the Emirates Stadium in the semi-final first leg

arts.ttl: 'Probably': Simone Inzaghi responds when asked if he wants to face Arsenal or PSG in CL final
arts.sum: Simone Inzaghi’s Inter Milan side await either Paris Saint-Germain or Arsenal in this month’s Champions League final. Inter Milan beat Barcelona by one-goal over two...

arts.ttl: Arsenal travels to PSG looking to overturn deficit and reach 1st Champions League final in 19 years
arts.sum: Boosted by the return of Thomas Partey, Arsenal looks to overcome a 1-0 deficit in its Champions League semifinal against PSG and do what only two teams have achieved in the history of Europe’s top competition. The only two teams to reach the Champions League final after losing the first leg of their semifinal at home are Ajax in 1996 and Tottenham in 2019.

arts.ttl: PSG’s home Champions League home record suggests semi-final tie with Arsenal is far from over
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have one foot in the UEFA Champions League final, but history suggests there’s still work to do. Luis Enrique’s men won the first leg of their semi-final tie…

arts.ttl: 'We're going to': Declan Rice says Arsenal really 'need a big performance' from £45m star vs PSG
Arsenal threaten EIGHT players with transfer list ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: As many as EIGHT Arsenal players are playing for their futures ahead of the massive Champions League clash with PSG, according to John Cross. Arsenal threaten EIGHT players with transfer list ahead of PSG clash
